command:
pwd && printf '
--- package scripts ---
' && bun -e 'const p=require("./package.json"); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts,null,2))' && printf '
--- tool auth/status ---
' && command -v gh && gh auth status && printf '
--- relevant env present ---
' && env | grep -E '^(M066_S05_|GITHUB_APP_ID=|GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY=|GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64=|AZURE_|KODIAI_|GH_)' | sed -E 's/(=.*/=***present***/' | sort

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import os
for k in sorted(os.environ):
    if k.startswith('M066_S05_') or k in {'GITHUB_APP_ID','GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY','GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64','GH_TOKEN','GITHUB_TOKEN'}:
        print(f'{k}=<present>')
PY
printf '\n--- PR #134 metadata ---\n'
gh pr view 134 -R xbmc/kodiai --json number,state,url,baseRefName,headRefName,baseRefOid,headRefOid,isDraft,mergeable,title,author
printf '\n--- PR files ---\n'
gh pr view 134 -R xbmc/kodiai --json files --jq '.files[] | {path,additions,deletions}'
printf '\n--- recent issue comments ---\n'
gh api repos/xbmc/kodiai/issues/134/comments --paginate --jq '.[-10:][] | {id, html_url, user:.user.login, created_at, body:(.body[0:120])}'
printf '\n--- reviews ---\n'
gh api repos/xbmc/kodiai/pulls/134/reviews --paginate --jq '.[] | {id, html_url, user:.user.login, state, submitted_at, body:(.body // "" | .[0:180])}'
printf '\n--- review comments ---\n'
gh api repos/xbmc/kodiai/pulls/134/comments --paginate --jq '.[] | {id, html_url, user:.user.login, pull_request_review_id, body:(.body // "" | .[0:180])}'

timeoutSeconds: 1800

review:
  profile: strict
  minConfidence: 70
  formatterSuggestions:
    automatic: false
    command: "python3 scripts/m066-formatter-smoke.py"
    maxSuggestions: 1
  triggers:
    onSynchronize: true
  suppressions:
    - pattern: "glob:*"
      paths:
        - "src/api/**"
  pathInstructions:
    - path: "src/api/**"
      instructions: |
        Treat all auth and token handling as high-risk. Require explicit validation and safe defaults.
        Prioritize findings

outputSnippet: {"body":"@kodiai format suggestions","created_at":"2026-05-05T05:28:39Z","html_url":"https://github.com/xbmc/kodiai/pull/134#issuecomment-4376745698","id":4376745698}

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, json, time
for i in range(10):
    print(f'--- poll {i+1} ---', flush=True)
    comments = subprocess.check_output(['gh','api','repos/xbmc/kodiai/issues/134/comments','--paginate','--jq','.[-8:][] | {id, html_url, user:.user.login, created_at, body:(.body[0:220])}'], text=True)
    print('comments:\n'+comments, flush=True)
    reviews = subprocess.check_output(['gh','api','repos/xbmc/kodiai/pulls/134/reviews','--paginate','--jq','.[] | {id, html_url, user:.user.login, state, submitted_at, body:(.body // "" | .[0:260])}'], text=True)
    print('reviews:\n'+reviews, flush=True)
    review_comments = subprocess.check_output(['gh','api','repos/xbmc/kodiai/pulls/134/comments','--paginate','--jq','.[] | select((.body // "") | test("suggestion|kodiai-review-output|mention-format-suggestions"; "i")) | {id, html_url, user:.user.login, pull_request_review_id, body:(.body // "" | .[0:260])}'], text=True)
    print('matching review comments:\n'+review_comments, flush=True)
    if 'mention-format-suggestions' in reviews and 'suggestion' in review_comments.lower():
        break
    time.sleep(20)
PY

command:
set -euo pipefail
review_json=$(gh api repos/xbmc/kodiai/pulls/134/reviews --paginate --jq '.[] | select(.id==4225484818)')
key=$(printf '%s' "$review_json" | jq -r '.body | capture("kodiai:review-output-key:(?<key>[^ ]+) ").key')
delivery=$(printf '%s' "$key" | sed -n 's/.*:delivery-\([^:]*\):head-.*/\1/p')
comment_json=$(gh api repos/xbmc/kodiai/pulls/134/comments --paginate --jq '.[] | select(.pull_request_review_id==4225484818 and (.body | test("```suggestion"))) | {id, html_url, body:(.body[0:260])}' | head -n 1)
printf 'REVIEW_OUTPUT_KEY=%s\nDELIVERY_ID=%s\nREVIEW=%s\nSUGGESTION_COMMENT=%s\n' "$key" "$delivery" "$(printf '%s' "$review_json" | jq -c '{id, html_url, state, submitted_at, user:.user.login, body:(.body[0:320])}')" "$comment_json"
start=$(date +%s%3N)
set +e
out=$(bun run verify:m066:s05 -- --repo xbmc/kodiai --review-output-key "$key" --delivery-id "$delivery" --json 2>&1)
code=$?
end=$(date +%s%3N)
set -e
printf '\nVERIFY_EXIT=%s\nVERIFY_DURATION_MS=%s\nVERIFY_OUTPUT=\n%s\n' "$code" "$((end-start))" "$out"
exit $code

command:
set -euo pipefail
start=$(date +%s%3N)
set +e
bun test ./src/handlers/mention.test.ts ./src/handlers/formatter-suggestion-orchestration.test.ts ./src/execution/formatter-suggestions.test.ts ./src/execution/formatter-suggestion-publisher.test.ts ./scripts/verify-m066-s05.test.ts --timeout 30000
code1=$?
mid=$(date +%s%3N)
if [ "$code1" -eq 0 ]; then
  bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false
  code2=$?
else
  code2=999
fi
mid2=$(date +%s%3N)
if [ "$code1" -eq 0 ] && [ "$code2" -eq 0 ]; then
  bunx eslint src/handlers/mention.ts src/handlers/formatter-suggestion-orchestration.ts src/execution/formatter-suggestions.ts src/execution/formatter-suggestion-publisher.ts scripts/verify-m066-s05.ts scripts/verify-m066-s05.test.ts
  code3=$?
else
  code3=999
fi
end=$(date +%s%3N)
printf '\nREGRESSION_TEST_EXIT=%s DURATION_MS=%s\nTSC_EXIT=%s DURATION_MS=%s\nESLINT_EXIT=%s DURATION_MS=%s\nBUNDLE_EXIT=%s TOTAL_DURATION_MS=%s\n' "$code1" "$((mid-start))" "$code2" "$((mid2-mid))" "$code3" "$((end-mid2))" "$([ "$code1" -eq 0 ] && [ "$code2" -eq 0 ] && [ "$code3" -eq 0 ]; echo $?)" "$((end-start))"
[ "$code1" -eq 0 ] && [ "$code2" -eq 0 ] && [ "$code3" -eq 0 ]
outputSnippet:
bun test v1.3.8 (b64edcb4)

src/handlers/mention.test.ts:
(pass) createMentionHandler coordinator wiring > logs when the mention handler falls back to a private coordinator [1.00ms]
(pass) createMentionHandler queued-claim cleanup > releases a pre-enqueue explicit-review claim when the request aborts before execution [57.00ms]
(pass) createMentionHandler enqueue routing > explicit review mentions enqueue onto the interactive-review lane with a stable PR key [1.00ms]
(pass) createMentionHandler e

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text=Path('.gsd/REQUIREMENTS.md').read_text()
start=text.index('### R085')
end=text.index('\n\n###', start+1) if '\n\n###' in text[start+1:] else start+600
print(text[start:start+800])
print('\n--- table row ---')
for line in text.splitlines():
    if line.startswith('| R085 '): print(line)
PY
outputSnippet:
### R085 — Formatter suggestion support must include a live GitHub smoke proof that at least one Kodiai-generated suggestion is accepted as a committable same-PR suggestion.
- Class: quality-attribute
- Status: validated
- Description: Formatter suggestion support must include a live GitHub smoke proof that at least one Kodiai-generated suggestion is accepted as a committable same-PR suggestion.
- Why it matters: GitHub suggestion acceptance has edge cases that fixture tests alone cannot fully p

command:
set -euo pipefail
start=$(date +%s%3N)
active=$(az containerapp revision list --name ca-kodiai --resource-group rg-kodiai --query '[?properties.active && properties.trafficWeight > `0`] | sort_by(@, &properties.createdTime) | [-1].name' --output tsv)
key='kodiai-review-output:v1:inst-109141824:xbmc/kodiai:pr-134:action-mention-format-suggestions:delivery-462ed8c0-4843-11f1-8135-1c6010084b2c:head-df017da6b6959038a288f8eae070b7a384ef0fa4'
delivery='462ed8c0-4843-11f1-8135-1c6010084b2c'
query=$(cat <<KUSTO
ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (datetime(2026-05-05T05:28:20Z) .. datetime(2026-05-05T05:33:30Z))
| where ContainerAppName_s == "ca-kodiai"
| where Log_s has "$delivery" or Log_s has "$key" or Log_s has "Format-only formatter suggestion request completed"
| project TimeGenerated, RevisionName_s, Log_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
KUSTO
)
summary=$(az monitor log-analytics query --workspace fb0d671a-6537-4c68-9f32-bef49c3d41d8 --analytics-query "$query" --output json | jq -c '[.[] | (.Log_s | fromjson? // {}) as $l | select($l.msg=="Format-only formatter suggestion request completed") | {revision:.RevisionName_s, msg:$l.msg, formatterStatus:$l.formatterStatus, commandStatus:$l.commandStatus, publisherStatus:$l.publisherStatus, suggestions:$l.suggestions, skipped:$l.skipped, capped:$l.capped, posted:$l.posted, publisherSkipped:$l.publisherSkipped, reviewOutputKey:$l.reviewOutputKey}]')
end=$(date +%s%3N)
printf 'ACTIVE_REVISION=%s\nLOG_SUMMARY=%s\nOBS_QUERY_EXIT=0 DURATION_MS=%s\n' "$active" "$summary" "$((end-start))"
outputSnippet:
ACTIVE_REVISION=ca-kodiai--deploy-20260504-222417
LOG_SUMMARY=[{"revision":"ca-kodiai--deploy-20260504-222417","msg":"Format-only formatter suggestion request completed","formatterStatus":"posted","commandStatus":"success","publisherStatus":"posted","suggestions":1,"skipped":0,"capped":0,"posted":1,"publisherSkipped":0,"reviewOutputKey":"kodiai-review-output:v1:inst-109141824:xbmc/kodiai:pr-134:action-mention-format-suggestions:delivery-462ed8c0-4843-11f1-8135-1c6010084b2c:head-df017da6b6959038a
